title: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Coimbatore is a city in Tamil Nadu with a population of 2,150,000. The Manchester of South India, a major textile and engineering hub at the foothills of the Western Ghats.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
